name: Bourbon Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Pk instant French vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, whip together the cream, milk, pudding mixes, and bourbon.
2. Refrigerate until slightly thickened.
3. Serve over or beside slices of pie.
4. Makes 1 1/2 cups.
5. Note: Combine the remaining 1/2 pudding mix with 1 cup of milk to make 2 servings of pudding.
